# OpenSIN Documentation - Full Context

> Canonical documentation, governance, and surface registry for the OpenSIN-AI ecosystem.

## Overview

OpenSIN Documentation powers docs.opensin.ai and stores the canonical docs, governance notes, architecture maps, and surface registry for the OpenSIN-AI ecosystem.

## Repository layout

- `README.md` — repo landing page and visual map
- `docs/` — VitePress documentation source
- `docs/governance/domain-registry.md` — verified public / gated / internal surface ledger
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` — contribution boundaries and workflow
- `SECURITY.md` — private reporting path
- `SUPPORT.md` — reader support routing
- `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` — collaboration norms
- `public/llms.txt` and `public/llms-full.txt` — site-facing discovery mirrors
- `docs/.vitepress/` — theme, nav, metadata, and build config

## Local workflow

```bash
git clone https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation.git
cd OpenSIN-documentation
bun install
bun run docs:dev
```

## Documentation map

- Guide: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/guide/getting-started.md
- Architecture: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/architecture/overview.md
- API: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/api/overview.md
- Governance: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/governance/overview.md
- Best Practices: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/best-practices/index.md
- Tutorials: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/tutorials/first-agent.md
- Examples: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/examples/hello-world.md
- Bridges: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/bridges/index.md

## Surface registry

- Public: opensin.ai, my.opensin.ai, blog.opensin.ai, docs.opensin.ai
- Gated: chat.opensin.ai
- Internal/unverified: api.opensin.ai, opensin.ai/agents

## Governance rules

- Keep claims evidence-based.
- Update the registry first when a surface changes.
- Keep discovery files in sync with the docs map.
- Prefer small, surgical documentation changes.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation
- Docs: https://docs.opensin.ai
- Registry: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/governance/domain-registry.md
